mdx.rawBody:
---
status: public
shortDescription: "String concatenation stringifies non-String operand expressions"
shortCorrection: "String concatenation evaluates non-String operand expressions and casts value to String"
concepts:
  - String
  - Expression
  - Operator
related:
  - id: VariablesHoldExpressions
    relation: Expressions seen as a first-order construct
spec:
  - id: jls13
    sections: ["15.18.1", "5.1.11"]
expressibleInNms:
- id: ExpressionAsTree
  how: expression involving concatenation of String and non-String
---

A plus with a String as one operand and an expression as another operand
concatenates the string and a string representation of the expression
(e.g., `"value:" + (1 - 3)` evaluates to something like `"value: (1 - 3)"`.

frontmatter.shortDescription: String concatenation stringifies non-String operand expressions
frontmatter.shortCorrection: String concatenation evaluates non-String operand expressions and casts value to String
